welcome.subtitle: Link the starting actor to the target film in as few moves as you can.

onboarding.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
onboarding.goalBody: Every game has a target film. Reach it by linking actors and movies.
onboarding.pickFilmBody: Tap %{filmName} from the filmography to hop to it.
onboarding.pickPersonBody: Now tap %{personName} to continue the chain.
onboarding.pickTargetBody: Tap %{filmName} — the target film — to complete the chain.

game.offlineBody: Check your internet connection and try again.
game.errorBody: We couldn't load the game. Please try again.

about.title: About
about.tmdbDisclaimer: This product uses the TMDB API but is not endorsed or certified by TMDB. All movie data, images, and metadata are provided by The Movie Database (TMDB).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataCollectionBody: Kinochain does not require an account, create user profiles, or store personal data in an application database.
privacy.networkRequestsBody: To provide gameplay, the app sends read-only HTTPS requests directly from your device to The Movie Database (TMDB). TMDB may receive your IP address and technical request information when processing these requests. Kinochain does not operate an intermediary server and does not receive or store this information.
privacy.analyticsBody: Kinochain does not include analytics, crash-reporting, advertising, or tracking SDKs and does not use request information for advertising or tracking.
privacy.localStorageBody: The app stores a small onboarding flag on your device to remember whether you have completed the tutorial. This data never leaves your device.
privacy.tmdbBody: Movie data and images are provided by TMDB. Read the
privacy.retentionBody: Kinochain does not operate a server or retain network request logs. TMDB handles information it receives according to its own privacy policy. Delete the app to remove its local onboarding preference.
privacy.contactBody: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at info@rightword.be.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: We couldn't load the data. Please check your connection and try again.

hint.reveal: Reveal hint: director and top cast
hint.describe: Shows the target film's director and main actors

credits.a11yHint: Selects this credit as the next link in the chain
